rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/25/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please file timesheets that conform to LRSF 14.52. Time records must identify the billing party providing the service and include the hourly rate for each billing party, the time spent on the services described in the entry, and the total fee charged for that entry. 2) Please file a memorandum of points and authorities including citing to probate code sections to support of the requests for appointment of trustee and transfer of venue. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/9/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOCELYN L WON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petitioner made preliminary distribution of the estate real property without prior court approval by signing and recording a bona fide gift deed transferring title from the estate to the beneficiary and unknown third party as joint tenants. The petitioner made the unauthorized preliminary distribution within 4 months after letters were issued to him as general personal representative without obtaining a bond from the beneficiary required by Probate Code section 11622(a). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL MARK POMMON JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine how to proceed. At prior three hearings counsel indicated an amended petition would be filed but no such filing has been made. Whether Probate Code 6124 applies to the Lost Will. 2) Issues in Janis Rachel Pommon Pozzi's Petition: a. In addition to all persons mentioned in the will, all heirs must be listed even if a decedent died testate. If the decedent had no known heirs, a declaration to that effect must be filed, setting forth the basis for that conclusion and the efforts made to locate heirs. [LRSF 14.18 C. 1)]. 3) Issues In Jonathan Campbell's Petition: a. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor(s) through whom they take (or would have taken) must be named, the relationship(s) to the decedent stated, and the date(s) of death specified. [LRSF 14.18 C.] b. Examiner does not have a proposed order. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7].

B. and C.] No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number. [LRSF 14.18 D.] The Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities is incomplete at item 2. rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/25/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No courtesy copies. No proposed order. No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7., 14.18 D., and 14.59 E.] Additionally, no (lost) will file appears to have been filed yet. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 5/16/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
